title: Event-Driven News Sentiment Micro-API
description: What it is: A tiny API that accepts short text (headline or press release snippet) or a URL and returns a numeric sentiment and a trading action hint (buy/hold/sell). Business angle: offer webhook-style integration for trading bots and terminals (pay for volume, higher accuracy models for paid tiers). Terminal-friendly demo: curl -X POST http://localhost:5000/sentiment -d '{"ticker":"tsla.us","text":"Company reports stronger-than-expected deliveries"}' returns {"sentiment":0.72,"action":"buy","explanation":"positive keywords: deliveries,stronger"}. Implementation surface: compact Flask app, optional tiny dependency (requests) for fetching URLs; sentiment scoring done with a small rule-based lexicon and simple heuristics (no ML required) so it stays lightweight and explainable.
